phase: T8 Jedi Knight / Jedi Master tree cleanup

scope.baseline: Uploaded repo snapshot with Armor Specialist cleanup and T7 Jedi cleanup applied before this pass.
outOfScope: Imperial Knight trees such as Knight's Armor and Knight's Resolve

implementedOrVerified.name: Ataru
implementedOrVerified.reason: The book text is a damage ability substitution, not a flat bonus. Damage contribution now uses Dexterity instead of Strength for lightsaber damage, including doubled Dexterity when two-handed. The old unused ActiveEffect flag was removed.

implementedOrVerified.name: Vaapad
implementedOrVerified.reason: The book text modifies lightsaber critical threat range only during lightsaber attacks. It is now exposed as a passive attack option for lightsabers with criticalThreatNaturalMin 19; it does not affect static sheet totals.

implementedOrVerified.name: Greater Weapon Focus (Lightsabers)
implementedOrVerified.enginePath: Attack roll PASSIVE/STATE path with explicit allowLegacyStateAttackBonus
implementedOrVerified.reason: The book text grants +1 on melee attack rolls with lightsabers. The old ActiveEffect system.attacks.lightsaber was removed and replaced with a roll-context attack modifier that requires melee + lightsaber context.

implementedOrVerified.name: Greater Weapon Specialization (Lightsabers)
implementedOrVerified.reason: Already implemented as +2 melee damage only with lightsabers; no change in this pass.

implementedOrVerified.name: Niman
implementedOrVerified.reason: Already implemented as +1 Reflex and +1 Will only while wielding/equipping a lightsaber; no change in this pass.

implementedOrVerified.name: Dark Deception
implementedOrVerified.enginePath: ActiveEffect for Deception class skill only; Force-sense spoof punted
implementedOrVerified.reason: The bogus attack modifier was removed. The class-skill ActiveEffect was retained because the data includes a class-skill component. The Force-sensing Dark Side Score spoof remains GM/player or future Force-sense context.

implementedOrVerified.name: Force Veil
implementedOrVerified.enginePath: No known static actor total consumer
implementedOrVerified.reason: The existing detection_range ActiveEffect is not a defense/attack/skill/speed/HP static total modifier. It was not touched in this pass.

implementedOrVerified.name: Force Treatment
implementedOrVerified.status: implemented by existing skill-use action link
implementedOrVerified.reason: The incorrect global Treat Injury trained ActiveEffect was removed. The existing action link rolls Use the Force as a Treat Injury substitute, which matches the core implementation direction.

extraneousRuntimeRemoved.name: Lightsaber Throw
extraneousRuntimeRemoved.correctHandling: Thrown-lightsaber attack option plus return prompt; no Reflex bonus.

extraneousRuntimeRemoved.name: Severing Strike
extraneousRuntimeRemoved.removed: Bogus attack +2 modifier and limb_loss ActiveEffect
extraneousRuntimeRemoved.correctHandling: GM/player adjudicated rider after a qualifying lightsaber hit would kill and exceeds DT.

extraneousRuntimeRemoved.name: Lightsaber Form Savant
extraneousRuntimeRemoved.correctHandling: Once-per-encounter Force suite return prompt for [Lightsaber Form] powers.

extraneousRuntimeRemoved.name: Shien
extraneousRuntimeRemoved.removed: Global ranged attack +5 modifier and deflect attack ActiveEffect
extraneousRuntimeRemoved.correctHandling: Only applies to redirected/deflected shots; needs Block/Deflect/Redirect Shot context.

extraneousRuntimeRemoved.name: Slashing Charge
extraneousRuntimeRemoved.correctHandling: Charge + Block/Riposte runtime context; GM/player until that flow carries the needed state.

extraneousRuntimeRemoved.name: Taint of the Dark Side
extraneousRuntimeRemoved.correctHandling: Persistent [Dark Side] Force Power choice and once-per-encounter no-DSS prompt.

extraneousRuntimeRemoved.name: Sentinel Strike
extraneousRuntimeRemoved.correctHandling: Target-context extra damage; punted until target denied-Dex/flat-footed context is reliable in attack and Force damage flows.

extraneousRuntimeRemoved.name: Improved Sentinel Strike
extraneousRuntimeRemoved.correctHandling: Only upgrades Sentinel Strike when Sentinel Strike applies.

extraneousRuntimeRemoved.name: Watchman's Advance
extraneousRuntimeRemoved.correctHandling: Surprise-round ally action economy; GM/player or future encounter prompt.

extraneousRuntimeRemoved.name: Sheltering Stance
extraneousRuntimeRemoved.correctHandling: Adjacent ally Block/Deflect permission; GM/player until Block/Deflect knows target adjacency.

extraneousRuntimeRemoved.name: Soothe
extraneousRuntimeRemoved.removed: Bogus movement attack +1 modifier and generic healing ActiveEffect
extraneousRuntimeRemoved.correctHandling: Vital Transfer runtime option: CT improvement instead of healing with self CT cost.

extraneousRuntimeRemoved.name: Lightsaber Specialist
extraneousRuntimeRemoved.removed: Generic blockDeflect action ActiveEffect with no verified consumer
extraneousRuntimeRemoved.correctHandling: Block/Deflect Use the Force bonus only with a self-built lightsaber.

extraneousRuntimeRemoved.name: Masterwork Lightsaber
extraneousRuntimeRemoved.correctHandling: Lightsaber construction choice + damage die reroll prompt for self-built lightsaber.

extraneousRuntimeRemoved.name: Prepared for Danger
extraneousRuntimeRemoved.correctHandling: Spend unspent Farseeing to regain another Force Power as a swift action.

extraneousRuntimeRemoved.name: Shoto Pin Block
extraneousRuntimeRemoved.correctHandling: Block-with-shoto rider restricting attacker melee attacks; GM/player until Block flow supports target restrictions.

extraneousRuntimeRemoved.name: Master Advisor
extraneousRuntimeRemoved.removed: Empty ActiveEffect and disabled placeholder modifier
extraneousRuntimeRemoved.correctHandling: Temporary Force Point grant tied to Skilled Advisor resolution.

needsPersistentChoicePicker.name: Taint of the Dark Side
needsPersistentChoicePicker.optionSource: Force powers with the [Dark Side] descriptor
needsPersistentChoicePicker.notes: Choose the power when the talent is selected; runtime prompt handles once-per-encounter no-DSS use.

needsPersistentChoicePicker.name: Share Talent
needsPersistentChoicePicker.optionSource: Eligible Lightsaber Combat, Duelist, or Lightsaber Forms talents
needsPersistentChoicePicker.notes: Not patched in this pass; should be handled by a future Jedi Instructor picker pass.

needsPersistentChoicePicker.name: Share Force Secret / Share Force Technique
needsPersistentChoicePicker.notes: Not patched in this pass; requires progression picker and ally runtime grant prompt.

needsUserReview.name: Shien
needsUserReview.reason: The pack description is empty and only the benefit text is present. The old automation was clearly wrong, but exact UX should be reviewed when Block/Deflect/Redirect Shot prompts are built.

needsUserReview.name: Lightsaber Forms tree membership
needsUserReview.reason: The tree appears to include prerequisite/base lightsaber talents alongside actual forms. I did not reshape membership in this pass because it can affect progression availability.

needsUserReview.name: Multiattack Proficiency (lightsabers)
needsUserReview.reason: The pack row has sparse/empty book text in this snapshot; leave for a later data-quality pass.

needsUserReview.name: Force Veil
needsUserReview.reason: Retained as low-risk because it is not currently a static actor total modifier, but future detection/sense systems should decide whether system.stealth.detection_range is the right field.

recommendedNextPatchOrder: Build/verify Block + Deflect + Redirect Shot runtime flow, then wire Shien, Lightsaber Specialist, Sheltering Stance, Shoto Pin Block, and Slashing Charge.
Build Force suite spend/regain prompt family for Lightsaber Form Savant, Direct, Prepared for Danger, Taint of the Dark Side, Healing Boost, Improved Healing Boost, and Soothe.
Add target-context support for flat-footed/denied-Dex riders before automating Sentinel Strike.
Review Lightsaber Forms tree membership separately before removing prerequisite/base talents from the tree.
Do Jedi Instructor persistent-choice talents as a dedicated picker pass.
